purpose: Provides SQL validation files and manual test guidance for checking the Supabase schema after migration apply.
expected_post_apply_checks: subscriber guidance public display defaults false
subscriber guidance subscriber display defaults false
guardrails: Validation SQL pack does not apply migration.
Rollback SQL is for test environment only.
RLS client behavior must be tested with authenticated client context later.
Do not enable Auth, payment, palm upload, or premium output in this stage.
